# B003. Bayesian Factor Regression

## Positioning

This is the Bayesian version of a factor model: a posterior over factor exposures rather than a single point estimate. It is best treated as a disciplined cross-sectional allocator with explicit uncertainty around every factor view.

## Reference Basis

- [View fusion vis-à-vis a Bayesian interpretation of Black-Litterman for portfolio allocation](../../references/papers/2301.13594_black_litterman_fusion.pdf) - posterior view fusion for factor blending
- [Machine Learning Approach to Portfolio Risk](../../references/papers/2_10_Machine_Learning_Approach_to_Portfolio_Risk.pdf) - risk-aware allocation framing

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### Fundamental Stack

Point-in-time fundamentals and macro-aware feature joins for slower rebalance cycles.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - fundamental and macro data loader
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature joins and lag alignment
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - tabular score model for the hybrid stack

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use point-in-time factor libraries, sector buckets, and any lagged fundamentals exposed through `src/ingestion/loader.py`.
- Keep covariance and exposure inputs aligned with the feature matrix in `src/features/builder.py`.
- Treat regime state as a shrinkage control rather than a source of alpha on its own.

## Execution Path

- Infer posterior factor exposures and convert them into a ranked score or weight vector.
- Blend the posterior with the current allocation engine or with a BL-style prior.
- Run the resulting weights through the same risk and paper broker gates used elsewhere in the repo.

## Risk Controls

- Do not allow point-in-time leakage from factor updates or delayed fundamentals.
- Cap concentration when the posterior overweights a single sector or style bucket.
- Reject the model if the uncertainty band is so wide that the allocation becomes arbitrary.

## Validation Gates

- Compare factor-neutral performance against F002 and the existing LightGBM baseline.
- Measure turnover and stability of the posterior exposures across regime changes.
- Check that the factor model improves risk-adjusted return rather than just raw return.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if factor timing disappears after costs or lag corrections.
- Archive if the factor inputs are not available point-in-time.
- Archive if the model is less stable than a simpler BL or HRP overlay.

## Next Step

Use this to benchmark whether Bayesian uncertainty actually helps over the simpler factor rankers in F002 and F015.
